prior_matrix: calibrated V5 formal unified score matrix

constraints.over_under_2_5: exact de-vigged closing average OU2.5 marginal

asian_handicap.identifiability_note: Two-sided quarter-line prices do not identify push mass. This mapping constrains only the expected win/loss settlement ratio, which is identifiable under the explicitly frozen symmetric net-odds-ratio assumption; it does not invent a full AH outcome distribution.

optimizer.asian_handicap_step: exact exponential tilt solving the frozen linear settlement-moment constraint by bisection

frozen_decision_rule: The three-surface profile is structurally promising only if it improves or preserves every frozen point metric relative to the existing GER 1X2+OU2.5 two-surface profile while improving the AH settlement dimension; any observed failure is retained and may not be repaired by tuning this 2025/26 holdout.
